modus.configuration.title: Modus
modus.configuration.structureRarity.warn: WARNING: Modded 'structures' that are detected may not be structures at all and are falsely flagged. Be careful with modifications.
modus.configuration.structureRarity.empt: Still loading structures - try reopening this screen in a moment, or load a world once.
modus.configuration.structureRarity.enab: Whether this structure is allowed to generate at all. Unchecked disables it completely.
modus.configuration.structureRarity.rari: Rarity multiplier for this structure. 1.0 = vanilla rate, 0.1 = 10x less common, 10.0 = 10x more common. Range: 0.1 - 10.0

This value is saved, but values above 1.0 have no effect for this structure - it isn't placed via the random-spread grid the 'more common' mechanism relies on (e.g. concentric-rings placements like strongholds). Values below 1.0 and disabling still work normally.
modus.configuration.moddedOre.title: Modded Ore Options
modus.configuration.moddedOre.warning: WARNING: Some 'ores' that are detected may not be ores at all and are falsely flagged. Be careful with modifications.
modus.configuration.moddedOre.empty: No modded ores found. Load a world once if you haven't, or the installed ore mod may use custom (non-vanilla) ore generation that can't be auto-detected.
modus.configuration.moddedOre.enabled.to: Whether this ore generates at all. Unchecked disables it entirely (checked = the mod's normal generation runs).
Frequency multiplier - how many veins generate, relative to the mod's own rate. 1.0 = unchanged, 2.0 = twice as many, 0.5 = half. Range: 0.0 - 10.0
modus.configuration.moddedOre.size.toolt: Size multiplier - how big each vein is, relative to the mod's own size (vanilla-ore-feature ores only). 1.0 = unchanged, 2.0 = bigger, 0.5 = smaller. Range: 0.1 - 10.0
modus.configuration.reset.confirm.title: Reset Confirmation
modus.configuration.reset.confirm.messag: Are you sure you'd like to Reset all values in %s?
modus.configuration.mobSpawnCaps.title: Mob Spawn Caps
modus.configuration.mobSpawnCaps.warning: WARNING: Modded entity spawn groups that are detected may not be accurate or spawn groups at all and could possibly be false flags. Be careful with modifications.
modus.configuration.mobSpawnCaps.enabled: Master switch for mob spawn cap overrides, vanilla and modded alike. Unchecked leaves every category at its vanilla/mod default.
modus.configuration.monsterMax.tooltip: Maximum MONSTER category mobs (zombies, skeletons, creepers, ...) per chunk. Vanilla default: 70. Range: 1 - 350
modus.configuration.creatureMax.tooltip: Maximum CREATURE category mobs (cows, pigs, sheep, ...) per chunk. Vanilla default: 10. Range: 1 - 350
modus.configuration.ambientMax.tooltip: Maximum AMBIENT category mobs (bats) per chunk. Vanilla default: 15. Range: 1 - 350
modus.configuration.axolotlsMax.tooltip: Maximum AXOLOTLS category mobs per chunk. Vanilla default: 5. Range: 1 - 350
modus.configuration.undergroundWaterCrea: Maximum UNDERGROUND_WATER_CREATURE category mobs (glow squid) per chunk. Vanilla default: 5. Range: 1 - 350
modus.configuration.waterCreatureMax.too: Maximum WATER_CREATURE category mobs (squid, dolphins) per chunk. Vanilla default: 5. Range: 1 - 350
modus.configuration.waterAmbientMax.tool: Maximum WATER_AMBIENT category mobs (fish schools) per chunk. Vanilla default: 20. Range: 1 - 350
modus.configuration.moddedMobCategory.to: Maximum mobs per chunk for this modded spawn category. Range: 1 - 350
modus.notification.mobSpawnCapReflection: [Modus] Mob spawn cap overrides are enabled in config, but could not be applied due to a reflection error. Check the server log for details.
